title: Interior minister hails Oyedele’s appointment as Finance minister, lauds Tinubu

paragraphs.english: ABUJA: The Minister of Interior, Dr Olubunmi Tunji-Ojo, has described the appointment of Dr Taiwo Oyedele as the Minister of State for Finance as a significant win for Nigeria’s economic sector, labeling the appointee a man of “unwavering dedication” and “brilliance.”
paragraphs.pidgin: ABUJA: Di Minister of Interior, Dr Olubunmi Tunji-Ojo, don described di appointment of Dr Taiwo Oyedele as di Minister of State for Finance as a big win for Nigeria’s economic sector, labeling di appointee a man of “unwavering dedication” and “brilliance.”

paragraphs.english: In a congratulatory message issued on Wednesday, following Oyedele’s successful screening and confirmation by the Senate, Tunji-Ojo noted that President Bola Tinubu’s choice reflects a commitment to meritocracy and expertise.
paragraphs.pidgin: For a congratulatory message issued on Wednesday, following Oyedele’s successful screening and confirmation by di Senate, Tunji-Ojo note tok President Bola Tinubu’s choice reflects a commitment to meritocracy and expertise.

paragraphs.english: “Beyond your track records, I have known you as a man of integrity, brilliance and unwavering dedication, not just in your field of expertise but also as a Nigerian who believes in the development of his country,” Tunji-Ojo said in the statement by his Special Adviser on Media and Publicity, Babatunde Alao.
paragraphs.pidgin: “Beyond your track records, I get known you as a man of integrity, brilliance and unwavering dedication, no just for your field of expertise but also as a Nigerian who believes for di development of im country,” Tunji-Ojo tok for di statement by im Special Adviser on Media and Publicity, Babatunde Alao.

paragraphs.english: The Interior minister noted Oyedele’s transformative impact during his tenure as Chairman of the Presidential Committee on Fiscal Policy and Tax Reforms, noting that his vision has already left a profound mark on the nation’s fiscal landscape.
paragraphs.pidgin: Di Interior minister noted Oyedele’s transformative impact during im tenure as Chairman of di Presidential Committee on Fiscal Policy and Tax Reforms, noting dat im vision get don already comot a profound mark on di nation’s fiscal landscape.

paragraphs.english: “I have no doubt that you will bring the same vision, commitment and excellence to this new role. It fills me with pride to see your talent and service recognized at this level. Nigeria is fortunate to have you leading in this critical sector and I celebrate your achievement with all my heart,” he added.
paragraphs.pidgin: “I get no doubt dat you go bring di same vision, commitment and excellence to dis new role. E fills me wit pride to see your talent and service recognized for dis level. Nigeria na fortunate to get you leading for dis critical sector and I celebrate your achievement wit all my heart,” im added.

paragraphs.english: Tunji-Ojo commended President Tinubu for the strategic appointment, expressing confidence that the new Minister of State for Finance would bring transformative excellence to the ministry.
paragraphs.pidgin: Tunji-Ojo commended President Tinubu for di strategic appointment, expressing confidence dat di new Minister of State for Finance go bring transformative excellence to di ministry.
